D:\Programs\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\my_bench.dir/objects.a
D:\Programs\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\my_bench.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\my_bench.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Programs\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -m64 -O3 -DNDEBUG -m64 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\my_bench.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o my_bench.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmy_bench.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\my_bench.dir\linkLibs.rsp
